parameters.description: states, multiple, no parameter means all
parameters.name: States

parameters.description: A comma separated list of groups, accounts or tickets. You can use "*" mask (any value) and "!" negation symbol while specifying the groups. For example: "demo*,!demoforex" - all groups whose names begin with 'demo', except for the group demoforex.
parameters.name: searchString

parameters.description: The flag of requesting only open orders. When set to 0, all orders are requested; when set to a non-zero value, only open orders are requested.
parameters.name: openOnly

parameters.description: Type, the index of securities, eg: 0
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: Hex format Color converted by BackgroundColor, readonly
parameters.name: hexColor

parameters.description: Allow realtime quotes from datafeeds, eg: 1, values: 0, 1
parameters.name: realTime

parameters.description: Save all incoming prices in a file, eg: 1, values: 0, 1
parameters.name: logging

parameters.description: Automatic limit percent of current market price, eg: 0.5, values: 0, 0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 3.0, 5.0, 10.0, 15.0, 20.0
parameters.name: filterLimit

parameters.description: ignore quotes, eg: 0, min value is 0
parameters.name: quotesDelay

parameters.description: Contract size, eg: 100, min value is 0
parameters.name: contractSize

parameters.description: Margin calculation, eg: 0, range from 0 to 4, 0=Forex 1=Cfd 2=Futures 3=CfdIndex 4=CfdLeverage
parameters.name: marginMode

parameters.description: Profit calculation, eg: 0, range from 0 to 2, 0=Forex 1=Cfd 2=Futures
parameters.name: profitMode

parameters.description: Strong hedged margin mode, eg: 1, values: 0, 1
parameters.name: marginHedgedStrong

parameters.description: Use open price for position value calculation, eg: 1, values: 0, 1
parameters.name: swapOpenPrice

parameters.description: Charge variation margin on rollover, eg: 1, values: 0, 1
parameters.name: swapVariationMargin

parameters.description: user define file name, if null, will be "mt4-symbols-{DateTime.UtcNow:yyyyMMddHHmmss}.xlsx"
parameters.name: fileName

/api/v3/mt4/symbols/import.summary: import symbols from excel file (export template) - multipart form
